markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 109-B — County emergency medical services vehicle

Every vehicle operated by a county emergency medical services coordinator or deputy county emergency medical services coordinator appointed pursuant to the provisions of County Law § 223-B (EMS training and mutual aid programs) , when operated in an official capacity while engaged in an emergency operation.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Every vehicle operated by a county emergency medical services coordinator or deputy county emergency medical services coordinator appointed pursuant to the provisions of County Law § 223-B (EMS training and mutual aid programs) , when operated in an official capacity while engaged in an emergency operation.
